item.title: 特朗普称美国将获新炼油厂，获信实集团支持
item.description: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，在印度信实工业有限公司的投资支持下，美国将迎来50年来首座新建炼油厂。【原文：President Donald Trump said the US will get its first new oil refinery in 50 years with the help of investment from India’s Reliance Industries Ltd.】

item.title: 蒂利斯会晤沃什后盛赞其表现，但仍拒绝解除对美联储的封锁
item.description: 唐纳德·特朗普总统提名的美联储主席人选凯文·沃什，虽获得一位关键共和党参议员的赞誉——该议员目前正阻挠其提名确认程序——但会晤结束后，沃什仍未能为自己的提名争取到明确的推进路径。【原文：Kevin Warsh, President Donald Trump’s pick for Federal Reserve chair, drew praise from a key Republican senator currently blocking his confirmation, but ended a meeting with him without securing a clear pathway forward for his own nomination.】

item.title: 私募信贷向软件公司Enverus追加4亿美元贷款
item.description: 知情人士透露，在去年12月提供约30亿美元贷款后，私营信贷机构近日又为黑石集团旗下Enverus公司提供了逾4亿美元的延期提款定期贷款。【原文：Private credit lenders have provided a more than $400 million delayed draw term loan for Blackstone Inc.’s Enverus after supplying roughly $3 billion in December, according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 雷森公司与债权人接近达成庭外债务重组协议
item.description: 知情人士透露，巴西糖业和乙醇生产商Raízen SA正接近与主要债权人达成协议，启动庭外债务重组。【原文：Brazilian sugar and ethanol producer Raízen SA is close to reaching an agreement with its main creditors to start an out-of-court debt restructuring, according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 亚特兰大联储董事会寻求能捍卫独立性的行长
item.description: 负责遴选亚特兰大联邦储备银行下一任行长的委员会负责人周二在接受采访时表示，维护美国中央银行的独立性是该委员会的首要任务。【原文：Preserving the US central bank’s independence is a top priority for the committee tasked with finding the next president of the Federal Reserve Bank of Atlanta, the leader of the committee said in an interview Tuesday.】

item.title: 欧洲央行行长拉加德称，央行不会允许上次通胀冲击重演
item.description: 欧洲央行行长拉加德表示，该行将确保伊朗战争不会像俄罗斯入侵乌克兰那样给欧元区带来同样的通胀痛苦。【原文：The European Central Bank will ensure the war in Iran doesn’t inflict the same inflation pain on the euro zone as Russia’s invasion of Ukraine did, according to President Christine Lagarde.】

item.title: 据澳大利亚广播公司报道，又有两名伊朗足球运动员寻求在澳大利亚寻求庇护
item.description: 伊朗女足队至少又有两名队员向澳大利亚寻求庇护，其余队员则于周二从悉尼启程前往吉隆坡。【原文：At least two more members of the Iranian female soccer team have sought asylum in Australia, while the rest departed Sydney for Kuala Lumpur on Tuesday.】

item.title: 奥特里·斯蒂芬斯之女出售价值20亿美元的Diamondback股份
item.description: 已故石油投机商奥特里·斯蒂芬斯的女儿正出售约20亿美元的钻石背能源公司股票，这些股票来自其父亲石油巨头公司出售所得。【原文：The daughter of late wildcatter Autry Stephens is selling about $2 billion of Diamondback Energy Inc. stock received from the sale of the oil mogul’s company.】

item.title: 多伦多上市企业MDA太空公司拟在纽约IPO募资3亿美元
item.description: MDA Space Ltd.计划在美国首次公开募股（IPO）中筹集3亿美元，这将使这家在多伦多证券交易所上市的机器人与卫星公司获得美国股票代码。【原文：MDA Space Ltd. is seeking to raise $300 million in an initial public offering in the US, giving the Toronto Stock Exchange-listed robotics and satellite company a US ticker.】

item.title: THL与林登资本支持的Smile Doctors公司正考虑达成20亿美元债务交易
item.description: 据知情人士透露，微笑医生有限责任公司正与投资者商谈，计划通过再融资约20亿美元债务来降低其借贷成本。【原文：Smile Doctors LLC is in talks with investors to refinance roughly $2 billion of debt to lower its borrowing costs, according to people familiar with the discussions.】

item.title: 二叠纪石油大亨继承人拟以20亿美元出售Diamondback股份
item.description: 据知情人士透露，Diamondback Energy Inc.的最大股东正计划通过出售这家石油和天然气公司的股份筹集高达19.4亿美元资金。【原文：Diamondback Energy Inc.’s largest shareholder is seeking to raise as much as $1.94 billion in a sale of shares in the oil and natural gas company, according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 交易员转向押注美国国债下跌，因战争引发市场回调
item.description: 债券交易员已转向押注美国国债下跌，在中东冲突引发油价飙升并激起通胀担忧后，他们正积极抛售看涨期货头寸。【原文：Bond traders have shifted to wagering on losses in Treasuries, aggressively dumping bullish futures positions after the Mideast conflict triggered a surge in oil prices and sparked inflationary worries.】

item.title: 秘鲁因未支付9900万美元仲裁费在美国面临新诉讼
item.description: 秘鲁政府在美国遭到一家高速公路特许经营商起诉，该企业试图追讨一笔9900万美元的仲裁裁决款项。此前因抗议活动阻碍其在南美国家收取通行费，导致该企业未能获得这笔款项。【原文：The Peruvian government was sued in the US by a highway concessionaire trying to collect a $99 million arbitration award stemming from protests that blocked it from collecting tolls in the South American nation.】

item.title: Cliffwater旗下330亿美元私募信贷基金将面临7%以上的赎回
item.description: 据知情人士透露，Cliffwater LLC旗下的旗舰私募信贷基金可能面临超过7%的赎回请求。【原文：Cliffwater LLC will likely face redemption requests in excess of 7% from its flagship private credit fund, according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 甲骨文人工智能订单推动云业务销售强劲增长
item.description: 甲骨文公司公布的季度云业务收入超出预期，并预测下个财年销售额将强劲增长，这表明该公司正有效兑现其庞大的AI订单。【原文：Oracle Corp. posted quarterly cloud revenue that was better than expected and projected strong sales in the upcoming fiscal year, a sign the company is making good on its massive AI bookings.】

item.title: 戈皮纳特警告称，持久的伊朗战争将使财政空间“枯竭”
item.description: 国际货币基金组织前首席副总裁兼首席经济学家周二警告称，全球各国政府缺乏应对伊朗长期战争引发的石油冲击所导致的经济衰退所需的财政能力。【原文：Governments around the world don’t have the fiscal capacity needed to respond to any economic downturn caused by an oil shock fueled by prolonged war in Iran, the IMF’s former top deputy and chief economist warned Tuesday.】

item.title: 通用催化剂公司讨论筹集约100亿美元资金计划
item.description: 据知情人士透露，风险投资公司General Catalyst近期转型为综合性金融服务公司，目前正与投资者洽谈筹集约100亿美元的新资金。【原文：General Catalyst, a venture capital firm that has recently transformed into a broader financial services company, is in talks with investors to raise about $10 billion in new funding, according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 加州市政债券因需求激增而价格高涨
item.description: 市政债券投资者正争相购买加州发行机构发售的免税债券。【原文：Municipal bond investors are clamoring for tax-free debt sold by California issuers.】

item.title: 据报道，SpaceX的星舰月球着陆器可能面临更多延迟
item.description: 根据周二发布的一份政府审计报告，SpaceX为美国宇航局（NASA）研发的星舰登月舱仍面临诸多技术挑战，其计划于2028年实现的登月任务很可能进一步推迟。【原文：SpaceX’s Starship lunar lander for NASA still faces numerous technical challenges and likely more delays ahead of a planned 2028 moon landing, according to a new government audit released Tuesday.】

item.title: 亚马逊交易推动美国高评级债券销售创历史新高
item.description: 美国企业投资级债券市场创下有史以来最大单日发行规模，亚马逊公司等企业共发行近660亿美元新债。【原文：The US corporate investment-grade bond market posted its largest day on record as companies including Amazon.com Inc. launched nearly $66 billion of new debt.】

item.title: 特朗普关税被推翻，谁能获得退税？
item.description: 关税退税的争夺战已然打响。但正如美国最高法院大法官布雷特·卡瓦诺所言，这场可能持续数年的法庭"乱局"仍在持续发酵。【原文：The scramble to get tariff refunds is on. But dissecting what could be a multi-year “mess” in the courts, as US Supreme Court Justice Brett Kavanaugh put it, is still unfolding.】

item.title: 美国银行聘请高盛的罗伊，加速推进全球科技并购业务
item.description: 美国银行公司已从高盛集团挖来杰森·罗伊，协助管理其科技投资银行业务，该银行正致力于强化其科技交易业务。【原文：Bank of America Corp. has hired Jason Rowe from Goldman Sachs Group Inc. to help run its technology investment banking franchise as the lender looks to strengthen its tech deals business.】

item.title: 杠杆贷款市场未竟之事
item.description: 寻找完美的短裤。【原文：Searching for the perfect short.】

item.title: 石油交易商筹集70亿美元信贷以应对战争动荡
item.description: 全球最大的大宗商品交易商正筹备数十亿美元的新信贷额度，为石油和天然气价格可能进一步飙升做准备——这种价格上涨可能引发巨额保证金追缴。【原文：The world’s biggest commodity traders are lining up billions of dollars in new credit lines as they position for further price spikes in oil and gas that could trigger giant margin calls.】

item.title: 美国上调2027年石油产量预测，因伊朗战争推高油价
item.description: 美国在近期因中东主要产油国供应中断导致油价飙升后，上调了对明年国内石油产量的预测。【原文：The US raised its forecast for domestic oil production next year after the recent surge in prices due to supply disruptions from key Middle East countries.】

item.title: 安大略省医疗保健养老金收益达7.7%，股票收益超越私募资产
item.description: 安大略省医疗保健养老金计划去年收益率达7.7%，因股票市场两位数的涨幅抵消了该基金私募市场投资组合的低迷回报。【原文：Healthcare of Ontario Pension Plan earned 7.7% last year after double-digit gains in stocks outweighed soft returns in the fund’s private markets portfolio.】

item.title: 韩国股市暴跌正吸引着沉迷杠杆ETF的交易者
item.description: 在距离首尔以南约一小时车程的华城，朴槿惠每晚熬夜至深夜，持续加码押注韩国股市的高风险投资。【原文：In Hwaseong, about an hour south of Seoul, Park Eun-hye has been staying up well past midnight to load up on risky bets on South Korean stocks.】

item.title: 赖特称美军护航船只通过霍尔木兹海峡，该帖随后被删除
item.description: 能源部长克里斯·赖特表示，美国海军护送一艘油轮通过霍尔木兹海峡，他在社交媒体上发布了这一消息，但该帖子显然在几分钟后就被删除了。【原文：Energy Secretary Chris Wright said the US Navy escorted an oil tanker through the Strait of Hormuz, announcing the news in a social media post that was apparently deleted minutes later.】

item.title: 油价暴跌15%，各国领导人竞相缓解供应冲击
item.description: 周二油价延续跌势，跌幅超过15%，因全球领导人承诺政策干预将缓解伊朗战争对能源价格的影响。【原文：Oil prices extended declines to trade more than 15% lower on Tuesday as global leaders provided assurances that policy interventions will blunt the impact of the Iran war on energy prices.】

item.title: 美元与原油的关联性是当前外汇市场唯一关键因素
item.description: 随着中东战火蔓延，美元走势完全取决于一个因素：油价。【原文：The US dollar has been at the mercy of a single factor as war spirals in the Middle East: the price of oil.】
